pi_items.source: task description and export_result.sh grep command

privileged_info_summary: The task generates a synthetic VeraCrypt master volume at '/home/ga/Volumes/data_volume.hc' with the initial password 'MountMe2024' during the setup phase. The task instructions and evaluation scripts expect the creation of a cloned volume at '/home/ga/Volumes/financial_transfer.hc', protected with the new password 'Transfer#2024' and a PIM of '485'. Furthermore, the cloned volume must contain a new file named 'transmittal_notice.txt' enclosing the phrase 'Authorized for transfer to External Auditor'. These specifications have been verified against setup_task.sh and export_result.sh.
